Issue.create.description: Triggered when a new issue is created in Linear

Issue.update.description: Triggered when an issue is updated (title, description, status, assignee, priority, labels, etc.)

Issue.remove.description: Triggered when an issue is deleted or archived

Comment.create.description: Triggered when a new comment is added to an issue

Comment.update.description: Triggered when a comment on an issue is edited

Comment.remove.description: Triggered when a comment is deleted from an issue

Project.create.description: Triggered when a new project is created

Project.update.description: Triggered when a project is updated (name, description, status, lead, target date, etc.)

Project.remove.description: Triggered when a project is deleted or archived

ProjectUpdate.create.description: Triggered when a new status update is posted on a project

Cycle.create.description: Triggered when a new cycle (sprint) is created

Cycle.update.description: Triggered when a cycle is updated (name, dates, progress, etc.)

Cycle.remove.description: Triggered when a cycle is deleted

IssueLabel.create.description: Triggered when a new issue label is created

IssueLabel.update.description: Triggered when an issue label is updated (name, color, etc.)

action.description: The action that was performed: create, update, or remove

type.description: The resource type that was affected (e.g. Issue, Comment, Project, Cycle, IssueLabel, ProjectUpdate)

actor.description: The user who performed the action. Contains id, name, email, and avatarUrl

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event was created

data.description: The full entity object after the action. For Issues: id, title, description, priority, status, assignee, team, labels, project, cycle, url, createdAt, updatedAt. For Comments: id, body, issue, user, createdAt. For Projects: id, name, description, state, lead, targetDate. For Cycles: id, name, number, startsAt, endsAt, team

updatedFrom.description: For update actions, contains the previous values of the fields that were changed (e.g. previous title, status, assignee)

url.description: The URL to the resource in the Linear web application

organizationId.description: The unique identifier of the Linear organization (workspace)

webhookId.description: The unique identifier of the webhook subscription that matched this event

webhookTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds of when the webhook was dispatched
